inputs.label: Percentage A
inputs.businessContext: The first percentage value for comparison

inputs.label: Percentage B
inputs.businessContext: The second percentage value for comparison

inputs.label: Use Absolute Value
inputs.businessContext: Set to 1 to calculate absolute difference, 0 for signed difference

inputs.label: Decimal Places
inputs.businessContext: Number of decimal places in the result

formulas.differenceRounded: Math.round((inputs.absolute === 1 ? Math.abs(inputs.percentageA - inputs.percentageB) : (inputs.percentageA - inputs.percentageB)) * Math.pow(10, inputs.decimalPlaces)) / Math.pow(10, inputs.decimalPlaces)
